transcript: Speaker A: खरंच गं, मला पण कळलं नाही तू इथे कशी काय? [Seriously, even I didn't understand how you are here?] Speaker B: अरे मला पण वहिनीने सांगितलं. इथे स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करायला लोक एकमेकांशी बोलू शकतात ना. [Oh, even sister-in-law told me. Here, people can talk to each other to practice spoken English, right?] Speaker A: हो गं, मी पण १५ दिवस झाले इथे प्रॅक्टिस करतोय. छान ऑप्शन आहे इथे. लोकांशी बोला आणि सगळे शिकायला येतात आणि कोणी जज नाही करत. [Yes, I have also been practicing here for 15 days. It's a great option here. Talk to people, everyone comes to learn, and nobody judges.] Speaker B: हो यार, भारी आहे खरंच. माझा तर आज पहिलाच दिवस आहे. आणि वाटलं नाही तुझ्याशी वर्षांनंतर बोलणं होईल ते पण MySivi वर. [Yes, it's really great. Today is my first day. And I didn't think I would talk to you after years, that too on MySivi.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Kavya, Rahul. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi AI English Speaking... Master Spoken Eng. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad features a split-screen layout with Subway Surfers gameplay on the bottom and a mock MySivi call interface on top. Two friends unexpectedly connect on the app and discuss how it offers a judgment-free environment to practice spoken English. The ad ends with a voiceover promoting MySivi's 10 million+ downloads and a trial offer for just 1 rupee.
